title: CCI orders probe into Venkateshwara Hatcheries on complaint by Maneka Gandhi's NGO
description: The Competition Commission of India (CCI) has ordered an investigation into Venkateshwara Hatcheries Group (Venky’s) and its affiliated entities on a complaint filed by Maneka Gandhi's NGO People for Animals (PFA) alleging anti-competitive practices in India’s poultry sector.The CCI has asked its investigative arm, the Director General (DG), to examine whether the group’s business arrangements with poultry farmers impose restrictive conditions that limit competition in the market."The Commission
